GEORGE R. MORRIS - RESUME 
Las Vegas, Nevada 89119 | (702) 905-6444 contact@georgethegeek.com | 
georgethegeek.com | github.com/repairgenie 
PROFESSIONAL IDENTITY & SUMMARY 
The "Jack of all Trades" IT Professional & AI Innovator A seasoned IT leader with over 20 
years of experience spanning the entire technical lifecycle—from physical hardware repair and 
network cabling to complex server architecture and AI-driven software development. 
●​Low-to-No Code Champion: Deeply passionate about leveraging Low-to-No Code 
platforms (WordPress, Webflow, AppGini) to empower users, streamline complex 
workflows, and bridge the gap between technical requirements and business solutions. 
●​Liaison Extraordinaire: Proven ability to act as the primary bridge between 
Engineering, Marketing, and Customer Success, translating high-level technical 
challenges into actionable business strategies. 
●​Vibecoding Pioneer: Expert at utilizing a multi-model AI strategy (primarily Gemini, 
supplemented by OpenAI) to build production-ready tools that solve immediate 
business bottlenecks with unprecedented speed. 
●​Infrastructure Architect: Deep expertise in server migrations, security hardening, and 
high-availability hosting environments. 
TECHNICAL SKILLS REPOSITORY 
AI, Low-Code & Rapid Development 
●​Primary LLM Integration: Advanced proficiency in Google Gemini (Flash/Pro) for core 
logic and OpenAI API for specialized tool-powering and creative problem-solving. 
●​Low-to-No Code Platforms: Expert-level mastery of Webflow (Design/CMS), 
WordPress (Ecosystem/Development), and AppGini (Rapid Database/CRUD 
Applications). 
●​AI Agentic Workflows: Experienced in utilizing Abacus.ai Deep Agent for rapid 
application prototyping and complex data-driven agents. 
●​Vibecoding Methodology: Building full-stack tools via AI assistance and low-code 
frameworks for immediate deployment. 
●​API Integration: SendGrid, OpenAI/Gemini API, Bitninja (API-level), various 
Cryptocurrency platform APIs.

●​Frameworks & Libs: PHP (Google Antigravity), TailwindCSS, Bootstrap. 
Server & Infrastructure Management 
●​Operating Systems: Advanced Linux (Ubuntu/CentOS/Debian) and Windows Server. 
●​Control Panels: cPanel/WHM, HestiaCP, CWP7. 
●​Virtualization: OpenVZ, KVM, Hyper-V, Docker. 
●​Cloud & Storage: AWS S3 (Backups), DigitalOcean, VPS management, Server 
migrations across global datacenters. 
●​Security: VPN deployment, Firewall management (UFW, Bitninja), KernelCare, 
Jetbackup, SSL/TLS. 
●​Networking: DNS management, DHCP, Active Directory, Network Cabling 
(DSL/VoIP/POTS), Ubiquiti UniFi, Grandstream VoIP, IP Security Cameras, Access Control 
Systems. 
Software & Web Development 
●​Languages: PHP (Current focus using modern design patterns), HTML5, CSS3, 
JavaScript, and Python. Primarily AI-assisted. 
●​Legacy & Integration: Webflow-to-PHP custom bridges, AppGini-based database 
systems. 
●​Database: MySQL, PostgreSQL, Relational Database Design. 
●​Support: PHP and Java application support. 
Support & Operations 
●​Frameworks: ITIL (Incident, Service Request, Problem, Change, Asset, and 
Configuration Management). 
●​MDM: Mosyle (Apple). 
●​Collaboration: Slack, Zoom, Microsoft Teams, Ticket Systems (Zendesk, etc.). 
●​Leadership: Customer Service & Relationship Management, Team Leadership, and 
Escalation Management. 
DETAILED WORK HISTORY 
Server Manager | Kings Global Consulting (Remote) 
February 2025 – February 27, 2026 
●​Strategic Problem Solver: Resolved high-level platform issues and suggested 
structural improvements for customer documentation and agent workflows. 
●​Technical Liaison: Bridged the gap between Engineering and Customer Service,

ensuring complex technical bugs were triaged correctly within company projects and 
systems such as a telehealth vendor and a crypto platform ecosystem. 
●​AI Development (Ricardo): Spearheaded "Ricardo," a RAG-based AI chatbot for 
high-volume chat spikes. Managed development roadblocks and cost-benefit analysis. 
●​Internal Tool Creation (The Innovation Suite): 
○​VPN Scanner: Engineered a Python-based tool for CS agents to verify IP 
addresses for active VPN infrastructure  to prevent fraudulent sign-ups. 
○​SendGrid Log Checker: Developed a dashboard for agents to verify email 
delivery independently. 
○​Bot Sharpener: Prototyped a tool to experiment with RAG training to improve 
LLM accuracy. 
●​Infrastructure & Security: Responsible for monitoring, maintenance, planning, 
migrations, and deployment of company servers. Established offsite S3 backups and 
deployed internal VPNs. 
●​License & Software Management: Managed ordering, payment, and maintenance for 
servers and software (Gyazo, TextExpander, cPanel, Jetbackup, KernelCare). 
Support Lead | Kings Global Consulting (Remote) 
October 2024 – February 2025 
●​Leadership: Managed and trained the support department; handled all Tier 3 
escalations from global team members. 
●​Documentation: Authored technical knowledge bases, self-help articles, FAQs, and 
training guides. 
●​WordPress Management: Led the development and maintenance of company-wide 
WordPress assets. 
●​Quality Assurance: Conducted quality assurance testing of products and services. 
Field Services Operations Tech | Ovation Workplace Services (at 
Caterpillar) 
August 2023 – April 2024 
●​Senior Support & Queue Management: Elevated to Senior Tech in East Peoria and 
Mossville, improving ticket queue management through ITIL service level management 
(SLM). 
●​ITIL Framework Execution: Delivered on-site desktop support and deployments 
utilizing ITIL incident and service request workflows. 
●​Vending Operations: Oversaw computer equipment vending machine operations, 
ensuring compliance with ITIL asset management. 
●​Stakeholder Relations: Built key relationships with HCL and Caterpillar stakeholders, 
fostering collaboration within ITIL communication channels.

●​Technical Maintenance: Executed hardware repairs and computer reimaging adhering 
to ITIL change management protocols. 
Self-Employed IT Consultant & Web Developer 
August 2006 – August 2024 
●​Universal Service Management (USM): Developed and maintained a custom 
CRM/Project Management system for IT organizations using AppGini, streamlining 
billing, field service history, and client lifecycle management. Over 2 years of active 
development. ●​Web Agency & Hosting: Designed and hosted websites using HTML5, WordPress, and 
Webflow. Managed Virtual Private Servers (VPS) for web developers and business 
clients. 
●​Infrastructure & Field Services: Established relationships with numerous companies to 
provide contract IT services including DSL, POTS/VOIP installations, network cabling, 
server rollouts, and PC/mobile repair. 
●​Business Development: Executed social media marketing strategies to build brand 
awareness and sourced new partnerships for contractor expansion. 
IT Analyst I | Peoria Park District 
February 2022 – October 2022 
●​Network Infrastructure & Troubleshooting: Managed and troubleshot wired/wireless 
network infrastructure primarily using Ubiquiti UniFi gear, alongside various 
managed/smart TP-Link desk switches. 
●​VoIP & Physical Security: Performed installations and troubleshooting for 
Grandstream VoIP desk phones and UniFi IP security cameras. Managed and 
maintained facility access control systems. 
●​MDM Deployment: Planned and deployed Mosyle MDM for all district Apple devices. 
●​Active Directory & Support: Created and managed Active Directory accounts for new 
employees and responded to technical support tickets from users. 
Technical Operations Officer | Arvixe (Remote) 
January 2013 – October 2015 
●​Web Hosting Support: Provided live (chat and phone) support for shared, VPS, and 
dedicated server clients, resolving complex tickets. 
●​Server Problem Resolution: Identified and resolved issues with DNS, email, and various 
server-side bottlenecks. 
●​Multi-OS Support: Supported both Linux and Windows environments in a high-volume

web hosting environment. 
PROJECT & INNOVATION PORTFOLIO 
●​Universal Service Management (USM): A robust, custom-built CRM solution 
developed with AppGini specifically for IT field services and organization-wide project 
tracking. ●​SupportWow.com (Released/In Redevelopment): 
○​V1 Build: Developed using Abacus.ai’s Deep Agent for rapid prototyping and 
deployment. 
○​V2 Current Development: Ground-up rewrite in PHP utilizing Google 
Antigravity to support multi-tier reseller architecture. 
●​Webflow-to-PHP CMS: A custom bridge designed to pair Webflow's design flexibility 
with PHP's server-side logic. 
●​Loan Calculator & Website Estimate Builder: Low-code/Custom hybrid tools built for 
dynamic quoting and agency service breakdowns. 
●​Bitninja IP Inspector (Prototype): Internal tool for KGC staff to troubleshoot firewall 
bans independently. 
EDUCATION & CERTIFICATIONS 
●​Associate’s of Applied Science, Networking | Illinois Central College (2005–2007) 
●​CompTIA A+ Certified (ID: COMP001004731840) 
●​Dell TechDirect Certified (Caterpillar Warranty Repairs) 
●​Dell DMS Softskills Certified (Tech ID: 520630) 
●​High School Diploma | Pekin Community High School (2001–2005)
